function.name: ls
function.description: List directory contents with intelligent filtering and workspace-aware path resolution. Automatically skips common build artifacts and provides structured metadata.

path.description: Directory path to list (defaults to current directory). Supports both absolute and workspace-relative paths.

paths.description: Multiple directory paths to list simultaneously. When provided, 'path' parameter is ignored.

show_hidden.description: Include hidden files and directories (default: false)

include_metadata.description: Include file metadata (size, type, modified date) (default: true)

filter_artifacts.description: Filter out common build artifacts and dependencies (default: true)

max_results.description: Maximum number of entries to return across all paths (default: 100)

commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use find_files to locate the directory or check workspace structure
Check directory permissions or choose different path
Use more specific path or increase max_depth filtering
